# Project Instructions

This repository contains the Northwind Traders Order Management System.

Before generating or modifying code, always read:
- AGENTS.md
- docs/northwind_traders_vs_code_agent_context.md

Follow Clean Architecture.
Use Vue 3 + Quasar + TypeScript for frontend.
Use ASP.NET Core Web API + C# for backend.
Use SQL Server + Northwind database.
Use EF Core Database First.
Use Repository + Unit of Work.
Use FluentValidation.
Use xUnit + Moq + FluentAssertions.
Do not add authentication unless explicitly requested.
All code, variables, classes, methods, files, folders, comments, UI labels, and documentation must be in English.
